    • refreshTypeDamageRelation

      @ShellMethod(key="dataset refresh typeDamageRelation", value="\u5237\u65b0\u6570\u636e\u5e93\u4e2d\u7684\u5c5e\u6027\u514b\u5236\u5173\u7cfb\u8868\u6570\u636e") @Transactional(rollbackFor=Exception.class) public String refreshTypeDamageRelation(@ShellOption(help="\u5c5e\u6027\u5185\u90e8\u540d\u79f0",defaultValue="") String name)
